task: Find a nationwide nearest animal shelter for birds around zip 10012.
final_result_response:
I navigated to https://www.adoptapet.com/, went to "Search shelters & rescues", entered zip code 10012, set the distance to Nationwide, and filtered by Birds. Here are the top results:

🐦 The NEAREST animal shelter for birds to zip code 10012 (Nationwide search) is:

1. 🏆 Tails of Love Animal Rescue, Inc. — 0.7 miles — New York, NY 10002 (Cats, Birds, Dogs, Small Animals)
2. Empty Cages Collective — 2.4 miles — Brooklyn, NY 11222 (Cats, Birds, Dogs, Farm Animals, Rabbits, Reptiles, Small Animals)
3. PAD PAWS Rescue — 2.7 miles — Jersey City, NJ 07302 (Cats, Birds, Small Animals)
4. Sean Casey Animal Rescue — 5.9 miles — Brooklyn, NY 11218 (Cats, Birds, Dogs, Reptiles, Small Animals)
5. They All Want To Live — 6 miles — New York, NY 10026 (Cats, Birds)
6. The Sweet Life Animal Rescue – Queens — 6.2 miles — Ridgewood, NY 11385 (Cats, Birds, Dogs, Farm Animals, Horses, Rabbits, Small Animals)

The closest nationwide shelter for birds near zip code 10012 is Tails of Love Animal Rescue, Inc., located in New York, NY 10002, just 0.7 miles away.
